calendar.matters:
Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult With a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared with petitioner Janice Leonard, who was present as the Guardian Ad Litem for James Alfred Tickner, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Order waiving Mr. Tickner's appearance at today's hearing was filed on March 13, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $38,661.23.
Attorney's Fees - $13,381.42.
Costs - $2,769.75.

A net balance of $22,510.06 shall be deposited with the Trust Office of the Sonoma Development Center (for the account of James Alfred Tickner) Post Office Box 1493, Eldridge, CA 95431.

Furthermore, future settlements from defendants in this action may be distributed in accordance with the terms set forth in Attachment 12 of the Orders Approving the Compromises, without further Order of the Court.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult With a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.
